_README: Routing map for auto_curate_folder.py. When a RAW folder is curated and no --vault-name is given, each rule is tried IN ORDER against the RAW folder name; the first match decides the destination vault. Unmatched folders fall back to creating a new vault named after the folder. 'match' is a case-insensitive glob by default (fnmatch: * ? [seq]); set 'regex': true to use a Python regex instead. These are EXAMPLE rules — edit them for your own folders. Order matters: put specific patterns before broad ones.

rules.note: example: route invoice dumps into a Finance vault
